text:

Log:
  www/cliqz: drop patch accidentally copied from www/firefox

  This port doesn't use --with-system-av1, so keeping the patch would
  only introduce unnecessary churn on updates.

  Approved by:	Santhosh Raju (maintainer, implicit)
